response.justification: The candidate brings 20+ years of broad individual contributor experience with genuine developer tooling depth — CI/CD infrastructure, test frameworks, and MCP tooling — and shows informal mentoring through workshops and community talks. However, the role is fundamentally a people management position requiring at least 2 years of managing direct reports and 3 years of technical organizational leadership, neither of which appears anywhere in the resume. Every role listed is an IC or solo founder position with no reported direct reports. That structural gap, combined with only superficial mobile platform exposure, makes the candidate materially unqualified for this specific opening despite solid engineering credentials.
strengths: 20+ years of diverse software development experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and systems programming with demonstrated depth in multiple stacks
Genuine developer tooling and testing infrastructure background: CI/CD setup at Altom, open-source test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Consistent knowledge-sharing and informal leadership through conference talks, multi-day workshops, Selenium courses, and recurring code kata/refactoring dojo sessions
concerns: Zero people management experience: every role is an individual contributor or solo founder position with no mention of direct reports, performance reviews, or team hiring
No evidence of organizational or strategic leadership: missing the required 3 years of technical leadership at a team or org level, roadmap ownership, or cross-team alignment work

Mobile platform depth is minimal: only a brief iOS/tvOS maintenance stint at WatchUp (2015–2016) and a minor internal device orchestration tool — far short of what a mobile platform ecosystem manager role demands

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test infrastructure background
